overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves from a neon-lit commercial plaza through a park area to a waterfront promenade, then turns back toward towering skyscrapers. Heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces and atmospheric haze throughout the cyberpunk urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet striped plaza toward a stairway entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: yellow and black diagonal striped pattern on rain-soaked ground
large red rectangular sign with white human silhouettes
vertical billboard with purple and orange graphics
tall building with illuminated windows and signage
tall black lamp post with multiple lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-slicked commercial plaza with distinctive yellow and black striped crosswalk patterns. Neon billboards cast colored reflections on the wet ground as the camera moves forward toward a stairway entrance. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction amid the sparse nighttime crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway transition to tree-lined upper plaza

events.description: leaving the open commercial plaza and ascending concrete stairs into a park area

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs toward the upper plaza level

entered.detail: wide set of concrete steps leading upward to the plaza
illuminated billboard displaying advertisement with pink and white graphics
orange and green geometric metal framework overhead
tall leafy trees lining the stairway approach

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete stairway leaving the neon plaza behind, entering a transitional zone with overhead metal canopy structures. Trees become visible as the environment shifts from commercial to park-like, with a large digital screen visible ahead at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open park plaza with outdoor gym equipment approaching waterfront

events.description: exiting the dense tree cover and approaching the open waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking through the park plaza toward the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: woman in light clothing walking across the plaza

entered.detail: punching bag and exercise station under the trees
orange illuminated rectangular seating blocks
tall palm trees silhouetted against the city lights
open paved area leading toward the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open park plaza with scattered trees and outdoor gym equipment visible to the left. The ground remains wet from rain as the camera approaches the waterfront promenade. A pedestrian crosses the frame from right to left as palm trees become visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with ocean view and palm trees

events.description: turning right to follow the waterfront path along the ocean
turning back toward the city away from the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront viewing the ocean, then turning back toward the city skyline

entered.detail: dark water visible beyond the railing in the foggy distance
metal safety barrier along the water's edge
arched metal and glass shelter structure with curved roof
large illuminated advertisement displaying 'ALL FOODS' text

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the waterfront promenade with the ocean visible through the haze to the left. The path follows the water's edge past palm trees and a covered gazebo structure. After viewing the water, the camera turns back toward the city, revealing the 'All Foods' billboard and the distant skyscraper cluster.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with mega-skyscrapers and neon advertisements

events.description: re-entering the dense commercial district with towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking toward the towering skyscrapers and looking up at the neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: massive dark tower with illuminated windows and upper level signage
overhead road structure with glowing red lights underneath
small art deco style booth with green illuminated roof
multiple stacked digital advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Returning to the dense urban core, the camera moves toward a massive skyscraper towering overhead. An elevated highway structure spans across the right side while neon billboards illuminate the scene. The environment shifts from the open waterfront back to the enclosed canyon-like streets of the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched commercial plaza into a rain-soaked urban park leading toward the waterfront. It begins on a rain-slicked plaza where yellow and black striped crosswalks reflect the glow of towering billboards as the camera follows a lone pedestrian toward a stairway. As the camera ascends the wide concrete stairs, the dense commercial lighting fades, giving way to a transitional zone sheltered by metal canopies. The scene then opens into a park-like plaza where the environment shifts to include scattered trees and outdoor gym equipment under the night sky. Finally, the camera moves across the wet ground past crossing pedestrians and palm trees as it approaches the open expanse of the waterfront promenade.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, hazy waterfront promenade back into the dense, towering urban core of the city. It begins along the water's edge, passing palm trees and a covered gazebo while the ocean remains visible through the atmospheric haze to the left. As the camera turns away from the coast, the view opens up to reveal the All Foods billboard and a distant cluster of skyscrapers. The scene then shifts from the open shoreline back into the enclosed, canyon-like streets of the city center, moving toward a massive skyscraper that looms overhead. Finally, the environment becomes fully urbanized as an elevated highway spans the right side and vibrant neon billboards illuminate the rain-soaked surroundings.
